name: mason4agents
description: Mason Registry powered tool installer for coding agents.

scripts.verify: bun run check:version && bun run typecheck && cargo test && bun test
scripts.build:js: bun build src/bin/mason4agents.ts --outdir dist/bin --target bun && bun build src/pi/extension.ts --outdir dist/pi --target bun
scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:native
scripts.pack:local: bun run check:version && bun run build && bun scripts/publish.mjs --pack --platform current
